features: Delicate light cream which hydrates & helps reduce redness.
Super soothing Aloe Vera & 6 skin smoothing emollients
description: Product Description We love Oh So soothing Aloe Vera! Its an amazing plant! Containing over 75 actives like vitamins & amino acids and with so many skin benefits we had to use it. So our hydrating day cream will help soothe your skin and reduce redness. Ingredients Aqua, Paraffinum Liquidum, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Juice, Tocopherol, Ceteareth-6, DMDM Hydantoin, Parfum, C13-14 Isoparaffin, Laureth-7, 2-Bromo-2-Nitropropane-1,3-Diol, Glyceryl Caprylate, Glyceryl Laurate, Polyacrylamide, Benzyl Benzoate. Safety Warning For external use only See more
